name: The First Wasp Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the potatoes onto a clean kitchen towel that can be stained.
2. Roll the grated potatoes in the towel and wring out excess moisture over the sink.
3. Melt the butter with the olive oil on a large griddle.
4. Form the grated potatoes into 4 pancakes.
5. Cook the pancakes over medium heat for about 10 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown.
6. Flip the pancakes and cook on the other side for about 5 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Serve plain or with sour cream and applesauce.
